column1: feedback_text
The app keeps logging me out every 5 minutes.
I would love a dark mode option for late-night use.
Customer support was very helpful and resolved my issue quickly.
The checkout process is confusing and I was charged twice.
The mobile app is very slow to load on my phone.
Please add the ability to export reports to Excel.
I am happy with the product, it does what I need.
The latest update broke the notifications, I do not receive any alerts.
It is hard to find the settings menu, the navigation is unclear.
The price is too high for the features offered.
Great user interface, very clean and modern.
I keep getting an error message when I try to reset my password.
Could you integrate with Google Calendar?
The search function returns irrelevant results most of the time.
Live chat support was unavailable when I needed urgent help.
I like the new design, but some buttons are too small.
Please allow multiple users to collaborate on the same project.
The onboarding tutorial is too long and skips important steps.
Sometimes the app crashes when I upload large files.
Your email notifications are too frequent and feel like spam.
The desktop version works well, but the mobile version is buggy.
Adding keyboard shortcuts would make power users more productive.
Billing history is difficult to understand and filter.
The response time from the server is excellent, pages load instantly.
I cannot change my email address in my account profile.
Reports are useful but lack customization options.
The product helped our team save a lot of time.
I was misinformed by the documentation, some screenshots are outdated.
Please add support for more languages, especially Spanish and German.
The search bar doesn't return any results even for common terms.
